sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps AS SELECT range(TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10', TIMESTAMP '2001-04-11', INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS generated_ts;
INSERT INTO test_timestamps SELECT range(TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-02', INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
UPDATE test_timestamps SET generated_ts = generated_ts + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE WHERE generated_ts < TIMESTAMP '2001-04-11 12:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_timestamps WHERE generated_ts BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10' AND TIMESTAMP '2001-04-11';
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE generated_ts < TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10 01:00:00';
